items.name: TCIL – L-2 Network & Monitoring, Helpdesk Support – 2 Posts

basic_details.job_title: TCIL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Network & Monitoring , Helpdesk Support Posts
basic_details.short_information: Telecommunications Consultants India Limited (TCIL) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of L-2 Network & Monitoring, Helpdesk Support. Candidates with B.E / B-Tech/MCA, BCA Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through TCIL official website tcil.net.in.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E / B-Tech/MCA or equivalent, Science Graduate/BCA or equivalent

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.tcil.net.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
seo_tags: Telecommunications Consultants India Limited L-2 Network & Monitoring

The online application opens on 21-05-2026, and closes on 21-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through BPSSC official website bpssc.bihar.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Electronics & Communication, Electronics & Tele Communication, Information Technology, or Electrical & Electronics with at least 50% marks (45% for SC/ST).

basic_details.job_title: BTSC Food Analyst Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Bihar Technical Service Commission (BTSC) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 11 Food Analyst. Candidates with B.Sc, M.Sc, M.Phil/Ph.D Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 20-05-2026, and closes on 19-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through BTSC website, btsc.bihar.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: For appointment as Food Analyst, the candidate must have passed the Food Analyst examination conducted by Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI), New Delhi.

salary_details.pay_scale: Revised Pay Structure Level-09 (Pre-revised Pay Band-2: Rs. 9300–34,800/-, Grade Pay Rs. 5400/-)

selection_process: Written Examination – Computer Based Test (CBT), 100 Marks, 2 Hours
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the BTSC official website https://www.btsc.bihar.gov.in. Hard copy, printed, handwritten, or offline applications will not be accepted. The online portal will be active from 20-05-2026 to 19-06-2026. Candidates must upload all required certificates and marksheets in the designated columns during the online application. All certificates must be issued on or before 19-06-2026. Candidates must ensure they satisfy all eligibility criteria before applying. Registered Mobile Number and Email ID must not be changed after submission as all communication will be sent through SMS/Email only.
seo_tags: Bihar Technical Service Commission Food Analyst Recruitment 2026

basic_details.job_title: BPSC Sugar Cane Officer Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online for 44 Posts
basic_details.short_information: BPSC Recruitment 2026: 44 Sugar Cane Officer vacancies. Apply online from 7 May to 31 May 2026 at bpsc.bihar.gov.in.

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 200/- (Rupees Two Hundred only) additional over the examination fee

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the BPSC Online Application Portal (bpsconline.bihar.gov.in), accessible on the official website https://bpsc.bihar.gov.in. Hard copy applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The online portal will be active from 07-05-2026 to 31-05-2026. New users must complete One Time Registration (OTR) on the BPSC portal - only one OTR per candidate is permitted. Multiple OTR registrations can lead to rejection of candidature.
seo_tags: Bihar Public Service Commission Sugar Cane Officer Recruitment 2026

basic_details.job_title: BPSSC Bihar Police Havildar Instructor Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 122 Posts
basic_details.short_information: BPSSC Recruitment 2026 aims to fill 122 vacancies for Havildar Instructor posts. Eligible candidates with 12th Pass can apply online from 01-05-2026 to 01-06-2026 through the official BPSSC website, bpssc.bihar.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Bihar Home Guard Service Cadre, Home Department (Special Branch), Govt. of Bihar

qualification.education_qualification: Intermediate (10+2) passed or equivalent from a recognized board/institution, as on 01-08-2025.

selection_process: Written Competitive Examination (100 Marks) + Physical Efficiency Test (100 Marks)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the BPSSC website. Hard copy of applications need not be sent to the Commission. Candidates should visit https://bpssc.bihar.gov.in and click on the "Home Guard" tab, then click the link related to Advt. No. 05/2026 to begin the application process. Only one online application can be submitted per candidate. If multiple applications are submitted by a candidate, all will be rejected and legal action may also be taken.
seo_tags: Bihar Police Subordinate Services Commission Havildar Instructor Recruitment 2026

basic_details.job_title: BPSC 72nd CCE Notification 2026 Out - Apply Online for 1230 Posts
basic_details.short_information: BPSC 72nd CCE notification is out to fill 1230 vacancies across Bihar. Candidates with Any Graduate Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 07-05-2026, and closes on 31-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through BPSC website, bpsc.bihar.gov.in.
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via BPSC OTR Portal - bpsconline.bihar.gov.in)

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 200/- (Rupees Two Hundred only) additional over the examination fee

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-9 and Level-7 and Level-6 (as per post, Bihar State Pay Matrix)

selection_process: Prelims (Objective MCQ) + Mains (Written) + Personality Test (Interview) + Medical Exam
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the BPSC Online Application Portal (bpsconline.bihar.gov.in), accessible on the official website https://bpsc.bihar.gov.in. Hard copy applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The online portal will be active from 07-05-2026 to 31-05-2026. New users must complete One Time Registration (OTR) on the BPSC portal - only one OTR per candidate is permitted. Multiple OTR registrations can lead to rejection of candidature.
seo_tags: Bihar Public Service Commission 72nd CCE Recruitment 2026
